name: daily_briefing
description:
Generate an executive briefing from 4DA's recent discoveries.

With synthesize=true (recommended), uses AI to generate genuine insights tailored to your context.

Returns:
- TL;DR summary (AI-generated when synthesize=true)
- Key themes with item counts
- Notable high-scoring items
- Actionable recommendations
- Trend highlights
- AI synthesis (when enabled)

Use this for your daily/weekly content review.

synthesize.description: Use AI to generate genuine insights (default: true if LLM configured)

compact.description: Return compact result with file reference (default: true for ~80% token reduction)
